terms.subtitle: We keep it straightforward. No hidden clauses, no legal jargon.

use_right.description: Deploy awesome apps. No abuse. No illegal content.

acceptable_use.description: Keep the platform safe and legal for everyone.
items: Host malware, phishing sites, or malicious software
Send spam or unsolicited commercial emails
Violate intellectual property or copyright laws
Attempt to hack, attack, or disrupt our systems
Resell or redistribute our services without authorization
Harass, threaten, or abuse other users
Host illegal content or facilitate illegal activities

sla.description: What you can expect from Kleff's infrastructure and support.

uptime.title: 99.9% Uptime
uptime.description: Production deployments with automated failover and monitoring.

infrastructure.title: 24/7 Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Always-on systems with redundancy across multiple zones.

backups.title: Automated Backups

ddos.title: DDoS Protection

items.title: Transparent Pricing
items.description: See exactly what you pay. No hidden costs or surprise bills.

items.title: Real Support

items.title: No Lock-in
items.description: Export your data and leave whenever you want. We make it easy.

items.title: Regular Updates

items.title: Fair Resource Limits

items.title: Data Ownership
items.description: Your code, your data, your deployments. You own everything.
